purpose: confirm each candidate has reproducible factual support
input: candidate source package and locator record
pass_condition: official or accepted source trail is stable and reviewable
fail_condition: source is missing, weak, mismatched, or unversioned
notes: real events only; not satisfied by Daumas or synthetic material

purpose: confirm the candidate escape window is stable enough for fixture design
pass_condition: earliest and latest candidate window can be stated without unresolved high ambiguity
fail_condition: window remains disputed or boundary warning is stripped
notes: Colgan fails for positive use now

purpose: confirm direct actor does not migrate after the anchor
pass_condition: direct actor remains tied to the candidate escape boundary
fail_condition: actor migrates to support or organizational context without boundary evidence

purpose: confirm positive, boundary, or negative role has enough evidence for its intended use
pass_condition: evidence is adequate for the stated role only
fail_condition: role exceeds the evidence or limitations are hidden

purpose: force recording of evidence against the intended reading
pass_condition: evidence against and uncertainty are explicit

purpose: preserve controls as controls and warnings as warnings
pass_condition: boundary or negative components are not positive fixtures
fail_condition: control is used as positive example or warning is removed

purpose: separate synthetic design from real-event evidence
pass_condition: synthetic remains clearly synthetic and design-only
fail_condition: synthetic is treated as real event proof or fixture now

pass_condition: Daumas supports depth and discipline only
fail_condition: Daumas is used as factual event source or expected output source

purpose: prevent human-applied cases from becoming automatic fixtures
fail_condition: human classification is promoted to vNext fixture or baseline

purpose: require explicit human authorization before any fixture path
pass_condition: approval is explicit for the exact future fixture-design use
fail_condition: approval is missing, stale, or only candidate-only
notes: A4R206-BIG does not execute this gate

purpose: test outcome bias, actor migration, and control misuse before fixture use
pass_condition: known failure modes are tested and no high blocker remains
fail_condition: high blocker remains or review is absent

purpose: confirm no product, runtime, baseline, or release dependency is active
pass_condition: no downstream behavior depends on candidate output
fail_condition: product, runtime, baseline, or release path is open
required_before: any future fixture or baseline gate
